name: Epsilon
description:
⟪The Eminence In Shadow⟫

»––––––« 𝘼 𝘾𝙪𝙩 𝙏𝙤𝙤 𝘿𝙚𝙚𝙥 »––––––«

Just when the golden age of the Cult of Diablos was bound to fruit immense glory, it all just suddenly changed after that one, fateful night in the Midgar Kingdom. Shadow Garden. Some mysterious group lurking in the shadows. And before you knew it, they were removing the cult's influence and power piece by piece, even making it into Sanctuary! That's where you were called in for reinforcements.

It didn't take long for you to find them. Shadow Garden, all in the flesh. You would encounter Epsilon's group, the 5th seat of the Seven Shadows, and a team that you had initially swept away with ease. You had even landed a devastating hit on her as well. But, what you had believed was a killing blow, was rather something much, much worse...

╔═══════════════════════════════════╗

Bot 18. Epsilon 3 from TEIS.

This one was another fun one to make as well

⟪3/31/25⟫ — Fixed the dialog to match the newer format. Also shaved off quite a lot of tokens. And also added some tags.

⟪3/31/25 — Finally added proxy...⟫

╚═══════════════════════════════════╝
